mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reading_history ( user_id, article_id, progress, duration, last_read_time, scroll_position, create_time, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{articleId}, #{progress}, #{duration}, #{lastReadTime}, #{scrollPosition}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE progress = #{progress}, duration = #{duration}, last_read_time = #{lastReadTime}, scroll_position = #{scrollPosition}, update_time = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM reading_history WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND article_id = #{articleId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM reading_history WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY last_read_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reading_history WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT rh.article_id as rh_id, a.title, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.user_id, a.author_name, u.avatar, rh.progress, rh.duration, rh.last_read_time, rh.scroll_position, DATE_FORMAT(rh.last_read_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as read_time, DATE_FORMAT(rh.last_read_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as read_date FROM reading_history rh LEFT JOIN article a ON rh.article_id = a.id LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE rh.user_id = #{userId} AND rh.deleted = 0 ORDER BY rh.last_read_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT rh.article_id as rh_id, a.title, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.user_id, a.author_name, u.avatar, rh.progress, rh.duration, rh.last_read_time, rh.scroll_position, DATE_FORMAT(rh.last_read_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as read_time, DATE_FORMAT(rh.last_read_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as read_date FROM reading_history rh LEFT JOIN article a ON rh.article_id = a.id LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE rh.user_id = #{userId} AND rh.article_id = #{articleId} AND rh.deleted = 0
